memoryArtifacts.headline:
Robert Atwater
(1500 – 15 May 1565)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Robert Atwater (also recorded as Water and Attwater) was a man of fortune and a Justice of the Peace of the county. 

He and his wife, Catherine Bright, had twelve sons and two daughters. The sons all …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Atwater於1500年出生在英國肯特倫哈姆時，他的父親John Atwater57歲，母親Mary de Lenham55歲。他於1500年之後與Catherine Bright結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1565年5月15日在英國英格蘭肯特倫哈姆享年65歲，埋葬在英國肯特倫哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Atwater于1500年出生在英国肯特倫哈姆时，他的父亲John Atwater57岁，母亲Mary de Lenham55岁。他于1500年之后与Catherine Bright结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1565年5月15日在英国英格兰肯特倫哈姆享年65岁，埋葬在英国肯特倫哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Atwater
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone whose dwelling was by a river or lake, Middle English atte water ‘at the water’.
History: This surname was established from an early date in New England. David Atwater was one of the group of settlers who founded the New Haven colony in 1638.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Atwater was born in 1500, in Lenham, Kent, England, his father, John Atwater, was 57 and his mother, Mary de Lenham, was 55. He married Catherine Bright after 1500. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 15 May 1565, in Lenham, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65, and was buried in Lenham, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Atwater est né en 1500, à Lenham, Kent, Angleterre, son père, John Atwater, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Mary de Lenham, avait 55 ans. Il a épousé Catherine Bright après 1500. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 15 mai 1565, à Lenham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Lenham, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Atwater 1500 in Lenham, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Atwater 57 und seine Mutter Mary de Lenham 55. Er hat nach 1500 Catherine Bright geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Mai 1565 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Lenham, Kent, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Lenham, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Atwater è nato il nel 1500 nel Lenham, Kent, England, il suo padre, John Atwater, aveva 57 anni e il suo madre, Mary de Lenham, aveva 55 anni. Lui sposato Catherine Bright dopo il 1500. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 15 maggio 1565, nel Lenham, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Lenham, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Atwaterが1500年にイギリスケントレンハムで生まれた時，父John Atwaterは57歳，母Mary de Lenhamは55歳であった。1500年以後にCatherine Brightと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1565年5月15日にイギリスイギリスケントレンハムで65歳で死去し，イギリスケントレンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Atwater(이)가 1500년 영국 켄트 렌함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Atwater(은)는 57세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary de Lenham(은)는 55세였다. 그는 1500년 이후 Catherine Bright(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1565년 5월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 렌함에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 렌함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Atwater nasceu em 1500, em Lenham, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Atwater, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Mary de Lenham, tinha 55 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine Bright após 1500. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de maio de 1565, em Lenham, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Lenham, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Atwater родился в 1500 г. в местности ленам, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени John Atwater было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary de Lenham, 55. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine Bright после 1500 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 15 мая 1565 г. в местности ленам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности ленам, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Atwater nació en 1500, en Lenham, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, John Atwater, tenía 57 años y su mamá, Mary de Lenham, tenía 55 años. Se casó con Catherine Bright después de 1500. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 15 de mayo de 1565, en Lenham, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Lenham, Kent, Inglaterra.
